title: Model Contents
description: Complete repository structure with all files and directories for a model
documentation:
## Purpose
Provides a detailed inventory of all files and directories in a model repository, including sizes, checksums, and local availability. This allows callers to inspect exactly what a model package contains before or after downloading.

## When to use
Use this type when a user or orchestrator needs to understand which files make up a model, verify checksums, or determine which files have already been downloaded. It is the output of a model-contents inspection cap.

## Notes
The `all_files` array is a flat listing of every entry in the repository. The optional `root` object provides the same information as a hierarchy for UIs that need a tree view. The `metadata` object contains repository-level information such as tags or licence identifiers if the repository exposes them.

total_size_bytes.description: Total size of all files in bytes

file_count.description: Number of files in the repository

directory_count.description: Number of directories in the repository

all_files.description: Flat list of all files in the repository

size_bytes.description: File size in bytes (null for directories)

local_available.description: Whether this file is locally available
